title: Taylor Swift Honors a Movie Star with a Music Video
summary: Taylor Swift made a new music video for her song about Elizabeth Taylor, a famous actress from long ago. She did not act in the video herself. Instead, she put together clips from Elizabeth Taylor's old movies and news videos. The video shows scenes from films like Cleopatra and Cat on a Hot Tin Roof. Taylor Swift admires Elizabeth Taylor and sees her as a role model. Elizabeth Taylor was a big movie star known for her beauty and strong characters. She was also famous for her love life. The song talks about Elizabeth Taylor's life, like where she got engaged and her violet eyes. Taylor Swift got permission from Elizabeth Taylor's family to make the video. Money from the video will go to help the Elizabeth Taylor Aids Foundation. Her grandson said his grandma would have loved the song.

background_read: Elizabeth Taylor was a famous actress born in 1932. She starred in many movies and was known for her beauty and strong roles. She was also in the news for her marriages. Taylor Swift is a popular singer who looks up to her. A music video is a video made to go with a song, often telling a story or showing images. Foundations are organizations that raise money to help people, like the Elizabeth Taylor Aids Foundation which supports AIDS research and care.
Article_Structure: WHO: Taylor Swift and Elizabeth Taylor
WHAT: A music video made by Taylor Swift honoring Elizabeth Taylor
WHERE: In a video released online, with clips from movies and news
WHY: To show admiration and raise money for charity

perspectives.description: Taylor Swift sees Elizabeth Taylor as a role model and wants to honor her through art.
